locales.name: User-Agent Switcher and Manager

locales.name: User-Agent Switcher and Manager
locales.description: 裝作是不同的瀏覽來源，以應對試著收集您網路瀏覽資訊來提供可能不服期待的特定內容的網站

locales.name: User-Agent Switcher and Manager
locales.description: Подменяет User-Agent на веб-сайтах, пытающихся собрать информацию о ваших путешествиях по сети и выдать не нужное вам содержимое

defaultLocale.name: uBlock Origin
defaultLocale.description: Finally, an efficient blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
defaultLocale.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finally, an efficient blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: 高効率ブロッカーついに登場。CPU とメモリーに負担をかけません。
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Lõpuks on valminud tõhus blokeerija. Protsessori- ja mälusõbralik.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Enfin un blocador eficaç. Sollicita pauc lo CPU e la memòria
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finalmente, um bloqueador eficiente. Leve para a CPU e a memória.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: O'r diwedd, rhwystrydd effeithlon sy'n well ar y CPU a'r cof.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: మొత్తానికి RAM ఇంకా CPU పై తేలికయిన, ఒక సమర్థవంతమైన నిరోధిని.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Un bloqueur de nuisances efficace, qui ménagera votre processeur et votre mémoire vive.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Einlik, in effisjinte adblocker. Brûkt hast gjin prosessorkrêft of ûnthâld.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Най-накрая, ефективен блокер. Щадящ процесора и паметта.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Akhirnya, pemblokir iklan yang efisien. Ringan penggunaan CPU dan memori.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: ਆਖਰਕਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਵੀ ਬਲੌਕਰ ਹੈ। CPU ਅਤੇ ਮੈਮੋਰੀ ਲਈ ਸੌਖਾ।
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: একটি শক্তিশালী বিজ্ঞাপন প্রতিরোধক, অবশেষে তৈরী হল। যা সিপিইউ এবং মেমরির জন্য সহনীয়।
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Ugu dambeyntii, xannibaado hufan. Ku fudud oo ku saabsan CPU iyo xusuusta.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Behingoz, blokeatzaile eraginkor bat. PUZ eta memorian arina.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Äntligen en effektiv blockerare. Lätt för både processor och minne.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Konečně efektivní blokovač. Nezatěžuje CPU a paměť.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Végre egy hatékony reklám- és követésblokkoló böngészőkhöz, amely kíméletes a processzorral és a memóriával.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: آخر کار، ایک مؤثر اشتہار کو روکنے والا، یہ کم cpu اور میموری لیتا ہے.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Ефективний блокувальник реклами таки з’явився. Не навантажує процесор та пам'ять.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: අවසානයේදී, මධ්‍ය සැකසුම් ඒකකය සහ මතකය අඩුවෙන් භාවිතා කරන කාර්යක්‍ෂම අවහිරකයක් ඇත.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finfine rendimenta reklamoblokilo. Afabla por ĉefprocesoro kaj memoro.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Hatimaye, kizuizi kinachofaa. Nyepesi kwenye CPU na kumbukumbu.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Cuối cùng, đã có một công cụ chặn quảng cáo hiệu quả, tiêu tốn ít CPU và bộ nhớ.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: როგორც იქნა, მძლავრი და შედეგიანი რეკლამების შემზღუდავი. ზოგავს CPU-ს და მეხსიერებას.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: وأخيراً, مانع اعلانات كفوء. خفيف على المعالج و الذاكرة.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: 이 부가 기능은 효율적인 차단기입니다. CPU와 메모리에 주는 부담이 적습니다.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finalmente, un blocker efficiente. Leggero sulla CPU e sulla memoria.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Endelig en effektiv blokkeringsutvidelse. Lavt CPU- og minnebruk.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Pagaliau, efektyvus blokatorius, neapkraunantis nei procesoriaus, nei darbinės atminties.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: आख़िरकार, क्रोमियम-बेस्ड ब्राउज़रों के लिए एक कुशल अवरोधक। सीपीयू और मेमोरी पर कम भार के साथ।
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: இறுதியாக, ஒரு திறமையான விளம்பரத் தடுப்பான். கணினியின் மையச் செயற்பகுதியின் மேலும் நினைவகத்தின் மேலும் இலகுவானது.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Axır ki, prosessor və yaddaş yükünü azaldan səmərəli bir əngəlləyici var.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Më në fund, një bllokues efikas që nuk e rëndon procesorin dhe memorien.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Конечно, ефикасен блокер. Лесен на CPU и меморија.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: มาแล้ว! โปรแกรมบล็อกโฆษณาได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ โดยที่ไม่กินซีพียูหรือแรม
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Ein effizienter Blocker mit geringer CPU- und Speicherauslastung.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: ಕೊನೆಗೆ, ಒಂದು ದಕ್ಷ ನಿರ್ಬಂಧಕ. ಮಿತವಾದ ಸಿಪಿಯೂ ಹಾಗು ಮೆಮೊರಿ ಬಳಿಕೇಒಂದಿಗೆ .
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: शेवटी, एक कार्यक्षम ब्लॉकर क्रोमियम आधारित ब्राउझरांसाठी. सीपीयू आणि मेमरी वर सोपे जातो.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finally, an efficient blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Endelig en effektiv blokkeringsutvidelse. Lavt CPU- og minnebruk.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Ó fin, un bloqueador eficiente que non chupa toda a memoria e o procesador.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Finalment, un blocador eficient que utilitza pocs recursos de memòria i processador.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Konečne efektívny blokovač. Nezaťažuje CPU ani pamäť.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Тинех Интернет тишкерӳҫӗ валли хӑвӑрт та витӗмлӗ чаркӑч пур.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Коначно, ефикасан блокатор. Ниски процесорски и меморијски захтеви.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: بالاخره، یک بلاکر کارآمد. کم حجم بر روی پردازنده و حافظه.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: അവസാനം, ഒരു കാര്യക്ഷമമായ ബ്ലോക്കര്‍. ലഘുവായ CPU, memory ഉപയോഗം.
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: 一款高效的网络请求过滤工具，占用极低的内存和 CPU。
locales.creator: Raymond Hill & contributors

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Akhirnya, penyekat yang cekap. Tidak membebankan CPU dan memori.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Nareszcie skuteczny bloker charakteryzujący się niskim użyciem procesora i pamięci.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Наконец-то, быстрый и эффективный блокировщик для браузеров.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Končno, učinkovita, procesorju in pomnilniku prijazna razširitev za blokiranje oglasov.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Beidzot, efektīvs bloķētājs. Nepārslogo procesoru un atmiņu.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Mainam na pangharang sa content. Magaan sa CPU at memorya.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Konačno, efikasan blokator. Lak na CPU i memoriji.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Erfin, ur stanker saotradurioù efedus hag a zouj d'ho reizhiad korvoiñ ha d'ho memor.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Viimeinkin tehokas estotyökalu, joka ei kuormita prosessoria ja muistia.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Վերջապե՛ս, արդյունավետ արգելափակիչ։ Խնայում է մշակիչը և հիշողությունը։

locales.description: Нарэшце, эфектыўны блакавальнік. Не нагружае працэсар і памяць.

locales.name: uBlock Origin
locales.description: Konačno, efikasan bloker. Štedljiv na procesoru i memoriji.

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Tema escuro para todos os websites. Cuide dos seus olhos, use o Dark Reader para navegação noturna e diária.

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: ప్రతి వెబ్‌సైట్‌కి ముదురు థీమ్. మీ కళ్లను కాపాడుకోండి, రాత్రి మరియు పగలు బ్రౌజింగ్ట్‌కి ముదురు థీమ్ ఉపయోగించండి.

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Тъмен режим за всеки уебсайт. Погрижете се за очите си, използвайте тъмна тема за нощно и ежедневно сърфиране.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Mode malam untuk semua situs web. Menjaga mata anda, menggunakan tema gelap untuk berselancar siang dan malam hari.

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: প্রত্যেক ওয়েবসাইটের জন্য ডার্কমোড। নিজ চোখের যত্ম নিন, নিত্যকার ব্রাউজিং এর জন্য ব্যবহার করুন ডার্ক থিম।
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: حالت تاریک برای همه سایت ها. مراقب چشمانتان باشید، برای وبگردی در شب یا روز از حالت تاریک استفاده کنید.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Mörkt läge på alla webbplatser. Ta hand om dina ögon och använd ett mörkt tema för att surfa på natten och dagen.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Tmavý motiv pro každou stránku. Používejte Dark Reader pro celodenní prohlížení webu a šetřete tak své oči.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Темний вигляд для кожного мережевого сайту. Піклуйтеся про свої очі, використовуйте темний вид для нічного та щоденного перегляду.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: සියළුම අඩවි සදහා අඳුරු ප්‍රකාරය. ඔබගේ නෙත් රැකගන්න, රාත්‍රී සහ දිවා කාලයේ දී වියමන අඩවි පිරික්සීමට අඳුරු තේමාව භාවිතා කරන්න.
locales.creator: Alexander Shutau

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Chế độ tối cho mọi trang web. Bảo vệ đôi mắt của bạn, sử dụng khi duyệt web vào ban đêm và hàng ngày.

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: 모든 웹사이트에 다크 모드를 적용합니다. 밤이나 일상적인 웹 브라우징 시 어두운 테마를 사용하여 눈을 보호하세요.

locales.name: Dark Reader
locales.description: Tema scuro per ogni sito. Proteggi i tuoi occhi usando il tema scuro mentre navighi, sia di giorno che di notte.

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.description: Mørkt tema for alle nettsteder. Ta vare på øynene, bruk Dark Reader for nettleseren, dag og kveld.

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.description: Тамни режим за сваки сајт. Пазите на своје очи, користите тамну тему дању и ноћу.
